## Description
Brief description of the change.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Schema change
- [ ] New query/operation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested this with a real catalog (not just the example)
- [ ] Schema changes include a migration path
- [ ] New operations include test cases
- [ ] Documentation is updated

## Related Issues
Fixes #(issue)
